articles.title: Navjot Kaur Sidhu, expelled Punjab Congress leader, launches political outfit Bharatiya Rashtrawadi Party
articles.description: Navjot Kaur Sidhu, wife of ex-cricketer and former Punjab Congress chief Navjot Singh Sidhu, announced this on social media.

articles.description: The Apple Recipes You’ll Want to Make on Repeat  The Indian Express

articles.title: Kalpakkam fast breeder reactor attains criticality
articles.description: PM Modi says it’s a proud moment for the country

articles.title: AI startup Rocket offers vibe McKinsey-style reports at a fraction of the cost
articles.description: Rocket's new AI platform combines strategy, product building, and competitive intelligence, aiming to move beyond code generation.

articles.title: Live: 90.66 lakh voters deleted in West Bengal, show new rolls
articles.description: Live  lakh voters deleted in West Bengal show new rolls

articles.title: ‘Could not remember name, stuttered’: Flyer hit on head by metal panel of aerobridge at Hyderabad airport
articles.description: Deepak Adoni exited a flight from Bengaluru when a heavy aluminium panel broke off from the aerobridge ceiling and hit him.

articles.title: Pinarayi Vijayan’s political career timeline
articles.description: As Kerala gears up for the crucial 2026 Assembly elections, Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan finds himself at a pivotal crossroads in his political career

articles.title: China is winning one AI race, the US another - but either might pull ahead
articles.description: Both sides don't want to let their rival dominate. And the competition may yet be transformed further.

topStories.title: Trump’s threat to strike Iran’s power plants looms
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump said ‘Tuesday will be power plant day’ in a vulgar post on social media.

topStories.title: Petrol, diesel prices on 7 April: Check fuel rates in your city today — Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Kolkata, others
topStories.description: Markets remain anxious amid the US-Israeli war on Iran, with Trump's 48-hour ultimatum to Tehran to open the Strait of Hormuz set to expire tonight. Since the start of the war, oil prices have risen by over 50%, though price levels in India remain steady. Check petrol & diesel prices today, 7 April.

topStories.title: Iranian people request US to keep bombing:  resident Donald Trump’s bizarre claim sparks reactions, ‘Voices in his head’
topStories.description: Donald Trump claims that Iranian civilians support US strikes on their infrastructure for freedom, despite concerns over potential violations of international law. Experts warn that targeting civilian infrastructure could backfire, turning public opinion against the US.

topStories.title: ‘Why would Iran agree to a ceasefire given US and Israeli track record?’
topStories.description: Political analyst Trita Parsi says no one should be surprised that Iran has rejected the idea of a US ceasefire deal.

topStories.title: Iran Supreme Leader "Unconscious", Not Involved In Decision-Making: Report
topStories.description: The body of elder Khamenei, who was assassinated in US-Israeli strikes on February 28, is also reportedly being prepared for burial in Qom, which is considered the seat of Shia clerical power.

topStories.title: Gold Price Today: MCX Gold Trades Flat Amid US-Iran War Uncertainties
topStories.description: The MCX gold May futures contract was 0.06% up to Rs 1,48,323 per 10 grams, while the MCX silver May futures fell 0.34% to Rs 2,32,575 per kg.

topStories.title: US-Iran war now a systemic tremor, not just a regional conflict: Nirmala Sitharaman
topStories.description: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman warned that the US-Iran conflict poses risks to the global economy, describing it as a systemic tremor.

topStories.title: Dhanushkodi Athithan, a Congress veteran, calls for making the party a people’s movement
topStories.description: Dhanuskodi Athithan, a long-standing Congress leader and former Union Minister of State for Youth Affairs and Sport, wants the party to do field work and take up people’s issues. “Look at Tirunelveli and Kanniyakumari districts where the party is still strong. This is because of this approach,” he points out

topStories.title: Supreme Court says legal studies textbook revision should be extended to all classes
topStories.description: Nataraj said that the committee will collaborate with the National Judicial Academy at Bhopal for revision and finalisation of curriculum of Class 8 and above,

dailyNews.title: JD Vance due in Hungary to back Orban's re-election bid
dailyNews.description: The US vice-president's visit is the latest show of White House support for the Hungarian leader.

dailyNews.title: Halt to strikes, sanctions relief, and control of Strait of Hormuz: Inside Iran's 10-point terms to end West Asia War
dailyNews.description: The rejection was conveyed by Pakistan, which has been acting as a primary intermediary in the war, ahead of President Donald Trump's Tuesday (US time) deadline to include all power plants and bridges as his ultimatum to make a deal ticked closer.

dailyNews.title: Vance heads to Budapest to shore up Orban’s support before Sunday vote
dailyNews.description: US vice president's Budapest trip highlights US-Hungary far-right alignment as Orban faces toughest electoral challenge.

dailyNews.title: Michigan holds off UConn to capture first men's basketball national title since 1989
dailyNews.description: Michigan defeated UConn to claim the men's basketball national championship, ending a title drought dating back to 1989 in a gritty NCAA Tournament final.

dailyNews.title: Nutella capitalizes on greatest free advertising moment in history on NASA Moon mission
dailyNews.description: A floating Nutella jar aboard NASA's Artemis II went viral, with internet users calling the zero-gravity moment the greatest free advertisement in history.

dailyNews.title: Coach K invokes Bill Belichick's rough UNC debut when asked about Michael Malone's Tar Heels hire
dailyNews.description: Duke legend Mike Krzyzewski isn't worried about UNC reportedly hiring NBA champion coach Michael Malone, citing Bill Belichick's tough transition to college.

dailyNews.title: CM Punk torches Pat McAfee after he's inserted into major WWE feud, demands WrestleMania ticket prices lowered
dailyNews.description: CM Punk fired back at ESPN broadcaster Pat McAfee on "Monday Night Raw," slamming his involvement in a major WrestleMania 42 feud with Cody Rhodes.

dailyNews.title: Economist editor says European leaders now fear a true NATO 'divorce' after Trump pullout threat
dailyNews.description: Trump is reportedly considering pulling the U.S. out of NATO, and European leaders are coming to terms with what may be a true divorce, says an editor.

dailyNews.title: Influencer Jake Paul says Charlie Kirk would have been 'the next president'
dailyNews.description: Jake Paul says Charlie Kirk would have eventually become president if he were not assassinated, while noting his own political ambitions after receiving Trump's endorsement.

dailyNews.title: Obama Center takes heat as critics cry foul over ID rules for free entry — while Dems blast voter ID laws
dailyNews.description: The Obama Presidential Center faces criticism over requiring ID for free admission, taxpayer costs and executive pay ahead of its upcoming opening.

dailyNews.title: Bikini skiing takes off on slopes as record warmth forces resorts into survival mode
dailyNews.description: Western ski resorts face record warm temperatures and low snowfall, with skiers swapping jackets for bikinis and T-shirts as trails close and dirt replaces snow.

dailyNews.title: ABC News had a 75-person division dedicated to 'get' Trump, Billy Bush claims
dailyNews.description: On the "Hang Out with Sean Hannity" podcast," former TV host Billy Bush alleged ABC News had a 75-person division dedicated to "get" Donald Trump during the 2016 election.

topStories.description: President Trump has told Iran it must open the Strait of Hormuz by 8 p.m. Tuesday or face the consequences, although he has delayed previous deadlines.

topStories.description: As President Trump’s deadline for new attacks loomed, Iran conveyed its conditions through Pakistani intermediaries.

dailyNews.title: Artemis II Astronauts Head Home After Historic Journey Around the Moon
dailyNews.description: The NASA lunar flyby took the four crew members farther from Earth than any humans. They witnessed a solar eclipse and received praise in a call from President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Pulls Out of Civil Rights Settlements Backing Trans Students
dailyNews.description: The Education Department said there was no precedent for the federal government terminating settlements stemming from civil rights investigations into schools.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court Clears the Way for Dismissal of Steve Bannon’s Conviction
dailyNews.description: Stephen K. Bannon, a former close aide to President Trump, was convicted for failing to comply with a congressional subpoena related to the investigation into the Jan. 6 attack.

dailyNews.title: BNY and Robinhood Will Help Run ‘Trump Accounts’ for Children
dailyNews.description: The new tax-sheltered savings and investment accounts will start accepting deposits this summer.

dailyNews.title: How Trump’s Endorsement in California Could Backfire Against Republicans
dailyNews.description: President Trump endorsed Steve Hilton, a Republican, in the governor’s race, which could help Democrats avoid being shut out of the general election.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns of "critical period" in Iran war as deadline to avoid escalation looms
dailyNews.description: President Trump's deadline for Iran to reach a deal to end the war or face punishing strikes on its bridges and power plants is less than 24 hours away.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Artemis II astronauts "modern-day pioneers" in live conversation
dailyNews.description: President Trump praised the crew of NASA's Artemis II mission in a brief chat late Monday, saying they had "inspired the entire world" after they looped around the moon in a record-breaking voyage.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Trump calls Artemis II crew, congratulates them on historic trip around moon
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke with the crew of the Artemis II mission on Monday as they capped off a historic day that saw them loop around the far side of the moon and begin their return to Earth.

dailyNews.title: 4/6: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Trump sheds new light on mission to rescue F-16 crew members in Iran; Artemis II sets record for farthest distance travelled from Earth.

dailyNews.title: Decorated F-16 fighter pilot describes what went into mission to rescue U.S. airmen from Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump is hailing the rescue of a downed weapons system officer as one of the most complex missions the U.S. military has ever attempted. Lt. Col. Dan Rooney, a decorated F-16 fighter pilot and combat veteran, joins CBS News to discuss.

dailyNews.title: Trump, top officials share new details of rescue of U.S. airmen from Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump and top national security officials shed new light on the daring rescues of two American airmen who were shot down over Iran last week.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens Iran with attacks on infrastructure unless deal is struck
dailyNews.description: President Trump has set a deadline of Tuesday night for Iran to make a deal, or face escalated attacks. “The entire country can be taken out in one night,” President Trump said, “and that night might be tomorrow night.” NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.
